options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: goal
options.description:
The goal for your game.
Brauner: Defeat Brauner in the studio portrait.
Dracula: Defeat Dracula in the throne room.

options.name: brauner_portraits
options.description: How many of ANY portraits are required to be cleared to access Brauner's portrait.

options.name: dracula_portraits
options.description: How many portraits are required to be cleared to access the Throne Room.

options.name: brauner_required
options.description:
If enabled, you will be required to fight Brauner before you can access the Throne Room,
Of course, this won't do anything if the goal is set to Brauner.

options.name: nest_portraits
options.description:
How many Portraits are required to be cleared to access the underground passage
at the castle entrance.

options.name: nest_of_evil_state
options.description:
The state of the Nest of Evil.
Vanilla: Nest of Evil has its original rewards, the two tome pages and Greatest Five.
Randomized: The three items in the Nest of Evil are random, and added to the item pool.
Required: You are required to clear the Nest of Evil before you can access your final boss.
Removed: The three items are added to the item pool, and the Nest of Evil is inaccessible.

options.name: shuffle_whip
options.description:
If enabled, the True Vampire Killer will be added to the item pool,
and the Whip's Memory fight will grant you a random item.
Otherwise, it will be at its normal location.

options.name: start_with_change_cube
options.description: If enabled, you'll start with the Change Cube by default

options.name: add_extra_items
options.description:
If enabled, some items and spells that are otherwise only obtainable
in other modes will be added to the item pool, such as Puppet Master.

options.name: exclude_owl_morph
options.description: If enabled, Owl Morph will not be added to the item pool.

options.name: stronger_glove
options.description: If enabled, the Strength Glove will be buffed and able to push stationary heavy objects on its own.

options.name: random_spell_charge_times
options.description: Randomizes the charge time of non-major spells.

options.name: start_with_call_cube
options.description: If enabled, you'll start with the Call Cube by default

options.name: unlock_all_quests
options.description: If enabled, all Quests will be unlocked by default.

options.name: randomized_quests
options.description:
Specify which Quests have random items. 'Preparations' is always included, regardless of settings. Nest of Evil is never included.
You can type any quest name, as well as the following shortcuts:
Requires Item: Any Quest which requires you to turn in an item or set of items (except for Almighty and Great Sage)
Defeat Enemies: Any Quest which requires you to defeat specific enemies.
Mastery: Any Quest which requires you to Master a subweapon.
Simple: Any Quest with no specific requirement other than reaching an area or changing your status.
Grindy: Any Quest with a high grinding requirement. (Includes the Mastery quests.)
All: Enables ALL quests
options: quest: find the king of birds

options.name: excluded_quests
options.description:
Specify Excluded randomized quests from the above option. Excluded Quests will still be randomized, but will always be your own junk items.
The same shortcuts from the above option apply.
options: quest: find the king of birds

options.name: portrait_shuffle
options.description:
Shuffles which areas the Portraits lead you to.
Split: Shuffles the normal and Brauner portraits separately
Full: Shuffles all of the portraits together
Add Nest: Full, but also shuffles the Nest of Evil portrait

options.name: experience_percentage
options.description: What percentage of EXP enemies give you. This is a percent of their original EXP amount.

options.name: sp_multiplier
options.description: Multiplier for the amount of SP given by enemies.

options.name: reveal_map
options.description: Start with the entire map visible.

options.name: reveal_hidden_walls
options.description: Automatically reveals all breakable walls/objects.

options.name: one_screen_mode
options.description: Allows the entire game to be played with only the bottom screen. Press Select to view the map.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
